basic_details.job_title: CMO Etawah Rural ASHA Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 195 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Chief Medical Office Etawah (CMO Etawah) has published the Rural ASHA Worker Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 195 Rural ASHA Worker positions. Candidates within the age range of 25 to 45 years and holding Class 8th or equivalent with good communication and mobilization skills are eligible to apply offline at etawah.nic.in. The application process will be active from 30 April 2026 to 15 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 45 years

qualification.education_qualification: Class 8th or equivalent, Good conversational and mobilization skills, Ability to reach community
qualification.details: Class 8th passed Good communication and mobilization skills Ability to work with the community

selection_process: Selection in open Gram Panchayat meeting based on specified criteria
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CMO Etawah Rural ASHA Worker Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:etawah.nic.in .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMO Etawah Rural Anganwadi Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the CMO Etawah Rural Anganwadi Worker recruitment is 15th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Rural Anganwadi Worker post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Rural Anganwadi Worker post is 25 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Class 8th or an equivalent examination. Additionally, good conversational and mobilization skills, along with the ability to connect with the community, are essential.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Rural Anganwadi Worker position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 195 vacancies for the Rural Anganwadi Worker post released by the Chief Medical Office Etawah.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the CMO Etawah Rural Anganwadi Worker recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment. Candidates belonging to General, OBC, SC, and ST categories are not required to pay any fee to apply.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Rural Anganwadi Worker post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a selection in an open Gram Panchayat meeting based on specified criteria. This ensures community involvement in the selection of Anganwadi Workers.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Rural Anganwadi Worker position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Rural Anganwadi Worker position is contract-based. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for the Chief Medical Office Etawah Rural Anganwadi Worker recruitment is CMO/NHM/GAKW/SEL/2026-27.
